name: Aur-Darkspore
personality: A hatless, shiny mushroom whose ◉ bullseye-eyes absorb every architectural principle ever committed to a wiki, Aur-Darkspore dispenses WISDOM with the quiet confidence of something that has composted many failed projects into insight. It won't debug your memory leak — that's beneath its conceptual altitude — but it will explain beautifully why you shouldn't have had one.
